lore.story: A swordsman in pursuit of invincibility, used by Laboratory 1718.

skill.name: Enemy's Bane
skill.description: Saber's attacks reduce enemies' Physical Defense by 3-8 for 5s on hit. This effect stacks up to 5 times.

skill.name: Orbiting Swords
skill.description:
Saber releases 5 swords that orbit around him and deal 75<font color="fba51f"> (+25% Extra Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> to nearby enemies on hit. The swords will retract back to him after the duration.

When the swords are active, Saber launches a sword at his target on each attack, dealing 200<font color="fba51f"> (+50% Extra Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> to the target and 50% damage to enemies along the path (damage reduced to 50% against minions). Each sword attack also reduces the cooldown of <font color="a6aafb">Orbiting Swords</font> by 0.5s and <font color="a6aafb">Charge</font> by 1s.

skill.name: Charge
skill.description:
Saber dashes in the target direction, dealing 75<font color="fba51f"> (+50% Extra Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> to enemies along the way while enhancing his next Basic Attack.

Saber can dash to the target, and his enhanced Basic Attack deals 75<font color="fba51f"> (+120% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> and slows the target by 60% for 1s.

skill.name: Triple Sweep
skill.description: Saber charges at the target enemy hero, knocking them airborne for 1.2s (unaffected by Resilience) and striking them 3 times over the duration. The first two strikes deal 120<font color="fba51f"> (+80% Extra Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> each, while the third strike deals 240<font color="fba51f"> (+160% Extra Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font>.

skill_combo.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS
skill_combo.description: Saber can use his 1st Skill to poke and weaken the enemy, follow with his 2nd Skill to close in, then use his Ultimate to finish them off.

skill_combo.title: LANING COMBOS
skill_combo.description: Saber can use his 1st Skill to poke and weaken the enemy, follow with his 2nd Skill to close in, then use his Ultimate to finish them off.
